markdownRemark.html:
[!WARNING] This release upgrades Traefik chart to v40.x which includes a breaking change for the ingress-nginx migration: the provider name changes from kubernetesIngressNginx to kubernetesIngressNGINX. Check https://github.com/traefik/traefik-helm-chart/releases/tag/v40.0.0 for more details

This release updates Kubernetes to v1.34.9.

Important Note

If your server (control-plane) nodes were not started with the --token CLI flag or config file key, a randomized token was generated during initial cluster startup. This key is used both for joining new nodes to the cluster, and for encrypting cluster bootstrap data within the datastore. Ensure that you retain a copy of this token, as is required when restoring from backup.

You may retrieve the token value from any server already joined to the cluster:

cat /var/lib/rancher/rke2/server/token

Changes since v1.34.8+rke2r2:

  • Set startup probes for etcd (#10479)
  • Bump K3s/containerd/etcd/kine/spegel/klipper-helm (#10513)
  • Set bootstrap to false for rke2-multus (#10521)
  • 1.34 Bump ecm distro tools to v0.72.0 (#10550)
  • Bump Traefik image and chart (#10561)
  • Update CoreDNS chart 1.46.0 and Update Kubernetes Metrics Server chart 3.13.1 (#10538)
  • CNI bumps for the 2026-06 Release Cycle (#10546)
  • Bump snapshot-controller (#10575)
  • Bump prime ingress nginx chart and image to v1.15.1 (#10578)
  • Bump BCI images for CVE reasons (#10583)
  • Bump k3s to remove golang version checks (#10606)
  • Update Canal chart with crd fix (#10600)
  • Update to coredns chart 1.46.002 (#10595)
  • Update to v1.34.9 and Go v1.25.11 (#10617)
  • Bump klipper-helm for CVE reasons (#10626)
  • Fix missing arm64 checksum (#10630)
  • Bump containerd with the fix for []byte (#10636)
  • Bump containerd to v2.2.5 (#10656)
  • Bump cri-api and containerd for upstream env string fix (#10675)
